subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enamored of the Joseph of the divine realm! Joseph of Canaan appeared in the bazaar of the terrestrial Egypt
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون یوسف مصر الهی یوسف کنعان با صباحت و ملاحتی در بازار مصر ترابی جلوه
subcodes.subjects: @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
